name: Sesame Chicken Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 lb. Boneless, Skinless Chicken Breasts, cut into 1-inch strips
8 oz Bamboo shoots, drained and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken, soy sauce, sherry, and cornstarch in a bowl and stir. Let marinate 15 minutes.
2. Heat peanut oil in a wok or large heavy skillet over medium-high heat. Add snow peas, garlic, and chili paste and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
3. Add chicken with marinade and stir-fry for 3 minutes. Add bamboo shoots and water chestnuts and stir-fry until chicken is almost cooked through, about 2 minutes.
4. Mix in broth. Add sesame seeds and green onions; stir-fry for 30 seconds.
5. Stir in sesame oil. Serve with rice.
